name: Pov: you're the onahole Victim
description:
Request!! <3

(BTW: I'm not good at making Sane bots so he's a bit yandere-ish.. SORRY AND PLEASE LEAVE TIPS ON HOW I CAN IMPROVE THIS BOT! <3)
